name: human_rights_documentation_ransomware_mesa_car_fair
premise: A vendor outage and an internal change window collided; rollback paths are not symmetric and both teams blame the other. In Human Rights Documentation, the situation tagged internally around human rights documentation ransomware mesa car fair has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. Framing has already hardened externally as care against fairness; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Priya Dubois
agents.identity: I am Priya Dubois, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Human Rights Documentation. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Elliot Dubois
agents.identity: I am Elliot Dubois, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Human Rights Documentation. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect fairness.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to fairness to secure care before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Priya Dubois must choose under care versus fairness. What does Priya Dubois do?
